commands.name: image
commands.description: Displays the image from the provided filepath in the terminal, using the appropiate graphics protocol.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Whether verbose logging should be enabled

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: import
commands.description:
Imports data from the F1 Live Timing API, if you have missed recording a session live.
The data is imported in a format that can be replayed in real-time using undercutf1.

options.name: --meeting-key
options.description: The Meeting Key of the session to import. If not provided, all meetings in the year will be listed.

options.name: --session-key
options.description: The Session Key of the session inside the selected meeting to import. If not provided, all sessions in the provided meeting will be listed.

options.name: --data-directory
options.description: The directory to which timing data will be read from and written to

options.name: --log-directory
options.description: The directory to which logs will be written to

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Whether verbose logging should be enabled

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: YEAR
arguments.description: The year the meeting took place.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Prints diagnostics about undercutf1, and the terminal in the command is run in.

options.name: --data-directory
options.description: The directory to which timing data will be read from and written to

options.name: --log-directory
options.description: The directory to which logs will be written to

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Whether verbose logging should be enabled

options.name: --notify
options.description: Whether audible BELs are sent to your terminal when new race control messages are received

options.name: --prefer-ffmpeg
options.description: Prefer the usage of `ffplay` for playing Team Radio on Mac/Linux, instead of afplay/mpg123. `ffplay` is always used on Windows

options.name: --prevent-sleep
options.description: Attempt to prevent the device/display from sleeping whilst the app is running. Intended to help prevent accidental stream disconnection due to inactivity on your device.

options.name: --force-graphics-protocol
options.description: Forces the usage of a particular graphics protocol.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
